# querydsl-ktx

> Null-safe infix Kotlin extensions for QueryDSL dynamic queries. Eliminates manual `BooleanBuilder` null checks by providing eight extension interfaces that turn `if (x != null) builder.and(...)` patterns into declarative infix expressions like `entity.name eq name`. Null arguments are automatically skipped. Works with Spring Boot 3.0+, QueryDSL 5.1.0+, Kotlin 1.7+, Java 17+.

- Interface-based scoping: implement only the extensions you need, no global pollution
- Null-safety contract: `and`/`or` preserve non-null side; `between(Pair)` degrades to one-sided comparison; all others skip on null
- QuerydslRepository base class: all 8 interfaces + pagination helpers + bulk DML

## Docs

- [Installation](https://harryjhin.github.io/querydsl-ktx/getting-started/installation/): Gradle/Maven setup and module selection
- [Quick Start](https://harryjhin.github.io/querydsl-ktx/getting-started/quick-start/): First null-safe dynamic query in 5 minutes
- [Dynamic Queries](https://harryjhin.github.io/querydsl-ktx/guide/dynamic-queries/): Core concept — null means skip condition
- [Extension Interfaces](https://harryjhin.github.io/querydsl-ktx/guide/extensions/): All 8 interfaces with signatures, SQL examples, null behavior
- [Pagination & SortSpec](https://harryjhin.github.io/querydsl-ktx/guide/pagination/): slice, page, fetch helpers + SortSpec dynamic ordering
- [Bulk DML](https://harryjhin.github.io/querydsl-ktx/guide/bulk-dml/): modifying helper with auto flush/clear
- [Full API reference (llms-full.txt)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/HarryJhin/querydsl-ktx/main/llms-full.txt): Complete API signatures and usage examples

## Optional

- [Why querydsl-ktx](https://harryjhin.github.io/querydsl-ktx/why/): Alternatives comparison (BooleanBuilder, Specification, top-level extensions, hand-rolled helpers)
- [API Reference (Dokka)](https://harryjhin.github.io/querydsl-ktx/api/): Generated KDoc API documentation
- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/HarryJhin/querydsl-ktx): Source code, issues, milestones
